---
title: "Project3Aim2_Dataprocessing"
author: "WB"
date: "2026-07-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
rm(list = ls())
library(memisc)
library(haven)
library(epiDisplay)
library(forcats)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(interactions)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(table1)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(purrr)
library(shiny)
library(reactable)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggbreak)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(ipw)
library(survey)
library(pollster)
library(reshape2)
library(multilevel)
library(psych)      
library(janitor)    
library(rstatix)    
```

```{r working directory and calling our file, include=FALSE}
setwd("/Users/will/Documents/UCSD/Project 3/Aim 2/Card Sort Data/")
df_raw  <- read.csv("BaselineSurveyExport_071726.csv")

df  <- as_tibble(df_raw)
```

## Initial cleaning/renaming

```{r cleaning, echo=FALSE}
# Remove exported qualtrics labels first two rows
df <- df_raw %>%
  # Remove first two rows (header text and values from Qualtrics export)
  slice(-(1:2))

# Filter if unfinished
df <- df %>% 
  filter(Finished==1)

# Rename other vars 
df <- df %>%
  rename(ID = `Last.4.Dig.Phone..`,
         position = `Job.Title`)

# Drop Qualtrics preview/test responses if present
if ("DistributionChannel" %in% names(df)) {
  df <- df %>% filter(DistributionChannel != "preview")
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = as.factor(Gender),
    Race = as.factor(Race),
    Ethnicity = as.factor(Ethnicity),
    Job.Title = as.factor(position),
    Clinic = as.factor(Clinic),
    Experience = as.numeric(Experience) 
  )

# Clean the clinic names
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Clinic_raw = as.character(Clinic),   # preserve original coded values before overwriting
    Clinic = case_when(
      is.na(Clinic_raw)                ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(Clinic_raw, ",")      ~ "Multiple Clinics",  # catches "1,4" etc.
      Clinic_raw == "1"                ~ "Adolescent Young Adult Medicine",
      Clinic_raw == "2"                ~ "Endocrinology",
      Clinic_raw == "3"                ~ "Gastroenterology",
      Clinic_raw == "4"                ~ "Orthopedics",
      TRUE                              ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Clinic = factor(Clinic, levels = c("Adolescent Young Adult Medicine",
                                        "Endocrinology",
                                        "Gastroenterology",
                                        "Orthopedics",
                                        "Multiple Clinics"))
  )

```

## Scoring and descriptive stats

```{r scoring, echo=FALSE}
# Implementation Climate Scale scoring
## Scale: 1 (Completely disagree) to 5 (Completely agree). No reverse-coded items.
ic_items <- paste0("IC_", 1:12)
stopifnot(all(ic_items %in% names(df)))

## Stored as numeric strings so convert to numbers
df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(ic_items), as.numeric))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    IC_Focus_Self        = rowMeans(across(c(IC_1, IC_2)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Focus_Clinic       = rowMeans(across(c(IC_7, IC_8)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Support_Self      = rowMeans(across(c(IC_3, IC_4)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Support_Clinic     = rowMeans(across(c(IC_9, IC_10)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Recognition_Self  = rowMeans(across(c(IC_5, IC_6)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Recognition_Clinic = rowMeans(across(c(IC_11, IC_12)), na.rm = TRUE),
    IC_Total = rowMeans(across(all_of(ic_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Scoring Edmonson's Psych Safety
## Scale: 1-7. Items 1, 3, 5 are reverse-scored (8 - x on a 1-7 scale).
epsc_items <- paste0("EPSC_", 1:7)
stopifnot(all(epsc_items %in% names(df)))

## Strings to numbers
df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(epsc_items), as.numeric))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    EPSC_1_r = 8 - EPSC_1,
    EPSC_3_r = 8 - EPSC_3,
    EPSC_5_r = 8 - EPSC_5,
    EPSC_Total = rowMeans(
      across(c(EPSC_1_r, EPSC_2, EPSC_3_r, EPSC_4, EPSC_5_r, EPSC_6, EPSC_7)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

# Scoring CSACD
# CSACD.I  = Collaboration (6 items, 0-6 scale) -> average
## CSACD.II = Satisfaction with decision (1 item) -> use as-is
## CSACD.III = Decision-making pattern (2 items) -> average
csacd1_items <- paste0("CSACD.I_", 1:6)
stopifnot(all(csacd1_items %in% names(df)))

## Strings to numbers 
likert_cols <- c(paste0("IC_", 1:12), paste0("EPSC_", 1:7), 
                  paste0("CSACD.I_", 1:6), "CSACD.II_1", "CSACD.III_1", "CSACD.III_2")

df <- df %>% mutate(across(all_of(likert_cols), as.numeric))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    CSACD_Collaboration = rowMeans(across(all_of(csacd1_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    CSACD_Satisfaction   = CSACD.II_1,
    CSACD_DecisionMaking = rowMeans(across(c(CSACD.III_1, CSACD.III_2)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

```

``` {r descriptives, echo=FALSE}
# Cronbach's alpha calcs
alpha_report <- function(data, items, label) {
  cat("\n---", label, "---\n")
  a <- psych::alpha(data[, items], check.keys = TRUE)
  print(round(a$total, 2))
  invisible(a)
}

alpha_report(df, ic_items, "IC - all 12 items")
alpha_report(df, c("IC_1","IC_2","IC_7","IC_8"), "IC - Focus subscale (4 items)")
alpha_report(df, c("IC_3","IC_4","IC_9","IC_10"), "IC - Support subscale (4 items)")
alpha_report(df, c("IC_5","IC_6","IC_11","IC_12"), "IC - Recognition subscale (4 items)")
alpha_report(df, c("EPSC_1_r","EPSC_2","EPSC_3_r","EPSC_4","EPSC_5_r","EPSC_6","EPSC_7"), "EPSC - all 7 items (reverse-coded)")
alpha_report(df, csacd1_items, "CSACD.I - Collaboration (6 items)")
```

``` {r descriptives 2, echo=FALSE}

score_vars <- c("IC_Total", "IC_Focus_Self", "IC_Focus_Clinic",
                 "IC_Support_Self", "IC_Support_Clinic",
                 "IC_Recognition_Self", "IC_Recognition_Clinic",
                 "EPSC_Total", "CSACD_Collaboration", "CSACD_Satisfaction",
                 "CSACD_DecisionMaking")

desc_table <- df %>%
  select(all_of(score_vars)) %>%
  psych::describe() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
  select(Variable, n, mean, sd, min, max, skew, kurtosis) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

print(desc_table)

# Demographic breakdown
df %>% tabyl(position)
df %>% tabyl(Clinic)

```

```{comparisons, echo=FALSE}
# Clinic comparisons
score_vars <- c("IC_Total", "IC_Focus_Self", "IC_Focus_Clinic",
                 "IC_Support_Self", "IC_Support_Clinic",
                 "IC_Recognition_Self", "IC_Recognition_Clinic",
                 "EPSC_Total", "CSACD_Collaboration", "CSACD_Satisfaction",
                 "CSACD_DecisionMaking")

## Descriptive means/SD by Clinic, for every score variable at once
means_by_clinic <- df %>%
  group_by(Clinic) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(score_vars), 
                    list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 
                         sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                    .names = "{.col}_{.fn}")) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 2)))

print(means_by_clinic)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
